creator: woodsb02@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 166932
Patch against ports/branches/2016Q1/multimedia/emby-server: MFH r408785

This patch provides a partial MFH of the changes made in r408785.
It is intended to be applied against ports/branches/2016Q1/multimedia/emby-server.

It merges the changes related to bug fixes, but not those related to the update of multimedia/emby-server to a newer version.
